mapper.sql: select id, return_code, asset_id, asset_name, asset_code, return_person_id, return_person_name, dept_id, dept_name, return_date, business_status, proc_inst_id, proc_def_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from asset_return
mapper.select:
AND return_code like concat('%', #{returnCode}, '%')
AND asset_name like concat('%', #{assetName}, '%')
AND business_status = #{businessStatus}
order by create_time desc

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN r.proc_inst_id IS NULL OR r.proc_inst_id = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS draft, SUM(CASE WHEN r.proc_inst_id IS NOT NULL AND t.ID_ IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending, SUM(CASE WHEN r.proc_inst_id IS NOT NULL AND hpi.END_TIME_ IS NOT NULL AND hv.BOOLEAN_ = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN r.proc_inst_id IS NOT NULL AND hpi.END_TIME_ IS NOT NULL AND hv.BOOLEAN_ = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected FROM asset_return r LEFT JOIN act_ru_task t ON r.proc_inst_id = t.PROC_INST_ID_ LEFT JOIN act_hi_procinst hpi ON r.proc_inst_id = hpi.PROC_INST_ID_ LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT PROC_INST_ID_, BOOLEAN_ FROM act_hi_varinst hv1 WHERE hv1.NAME_ = 'approved' AND hv1.ID_ = (SELECT MAX(ID_) FROM act_hi_varinst hv2 WHERE hv2.PROC_INST_ID_ = hv1.PROC_INST_ID_ AND hv2.NAME_ = 'approved')) hv ON r.proc_inst_id = hv.PROC_INST_ID_ WHERE r.del_flag = '0'
